title: Admin Dashboard
description: Manage and monitor platform statistics and users
noInconsistentUsersTitle: No inconsistent users on this page
noInconsistentUsersDescription: Run a full check to refresh the list.
noMatchingUsersDesc: Try a different search term or clear the search to see all users.
noUsersFoundDesc: No users have been registered yet.
userAnalysisDesc: Summary, statistics and performance for selected user
failedToLoadUserAnalytics: Failed to load user analytics. Please try again.
aiProvidersStatisticsDesc: Overview of AI provider performance and status
securityMetricsDesc: Authentication, authorization, and data security indicators
gameStatisticsDesc: Overview of game metrics. See Topics and Performance tabs for distribution charts.
aiProviderHealthStatusDesc: Real-time health monitoring of AI providers
dataConsistencyDesc: Monitor and fix data consistency issues between user_stats and game_history
usersWithInconsistenciesDesc: Users with data inconsistencies that need to be fixed
detailedConsistencyDesc: Detailed consistency check for selected user
noTriviaFoundDescription: Try adjusting filters or add new questions.
securityRecommendationsDesc: Actionable recommendations to improve system performance and security
pricingConfigDesc: Edit credit package prices and amounts. Changes apply to the payment page.
platformTrendsDesc: Historical trends and performance metrics over time
noAnalyticsForUser: No analytics data for this user.
systemInsightsDesc: Key insights about system health, performance, and user behavior
failedToLoadUsers: Failed to load users. Please try again later.
pricingValidationCredits: Credits must be a whole number between {{minCredits}} and {{maxCredits}}.
pricingValidationPrice: USD price must be between {{minPrice}} and {{maxPrice}}.
pricingValidationPriceIls: ILS price must be between {{minPrice}} and {{maxPrice}}.
pricingValidationDuplicateIds: Each package must have a unique internal ID (SKU).
pricingValidationPackageCount: You must have between {{min}} and {{max}} credit packages.
restoreDefaultsConfirmDesc: This replaces the table with the built-in default packages. You still need to click Save to persist.

userInsightCopy.improvementTopic: {{topic}}: {{rate}}% success — consider more practice ({{games}} games played)
userInsightCopy.bestStreak: Best streak of {{days}} consecutive days playing
userInsightCopy.fallbackHighlight: Last game completed successfully — keep it up!

user-rec-success-rate.title: Low answer accuracy
user-rec-success-rate.message: Try puzzles at an easier difficulty to build confidence.
user-rec-success-rate.action: Play a short series in favorite topics at easy level.

user-rec-time-management.title: Response time longer than usual
user-rec-time-management.description: Average response time is especially high in: {{topics}}.
user-rec-time-management.message: Practice with time limits to improve speed.
user-rec-time-management.action: Try time-limited play in these topics twice a day.

user-rec-engagement.title: Keep your play streak going
user-rec-engagement.description: Your active-day streak is still short.
user-rec-engagement.message: Play at least one short session daily to grow the streak.
user-rec-engagement.action: Set a daily reminder for a five-question game.

perf-001.title: High response time
perf-001.description: Server response time is {{responseTimeMs}} ms, above the comfort zone.
perf-001.message: Optimize slow queries or add caching where it helps.
perf-001.action: Review slow-query logs and hot endpoints.
perf-001.estimatedImpact: Better UX and lower server load

sec-001.title: Many failed logins
sec-001.description: There have been {{failedLogins}} failed login attempts.
sec-001.message: Consider rate limiting or CAPTCHA on sign-in.
sec-001.action: Review auth logs and harden protections.

perf-002.title: High memory usage
perf-002.description: Server memory usage is {{memoryUsage}}%, close to capacity.
perf-002.message: Reduce memory pressure or scale resources.
perf-002.action: Profile heavy operations and trim data structures.
perf-002.estimatedImpact: Fewer memory issues and steadier performance

perf-003.title: High error rate
perf-003.description: Error rate is {{errorRate}}%, above the acceptable threshold.
perf-003.message: Triage logs and fix recurring failures.
perf-003.action: Fix top errors and improve handling paths.
perf-003.estimatedImpact: More reliable service and smoother UX
